scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:full && npm run test:e2e:tech
scripts.test:e2e:visual:full: VITE_VARIANT=full playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom"
scripts.test:e2e:visual:tech: VITE_VARIANT=tech playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom"
scripts.test:e2e:visual: npm run test:e2e:visual:full && npm run test:e2e:visual:tech
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update:full: VITE_VARIANT=full playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update:tech: VITE_VARIANT=tech playwright test -g "matches golden screenshots per layer and zoom" --update-snapshots
scripts.test:e2e:visual:update: npm run test:e2e:visual:update:full && npm run test:e2e:visual:update:tech
scripts.desktop:package:macos:full:signed: VITE_VARIANT=full APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY=${APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY:-} APPLE_ID=${APPLE_ID:-} APPLE_PASSWORD=${APPLE_PASSWORD:-} APPLE_TEAM_ID=${APPLE_TEAM_ID:-} npx @tauri-apps/cli build --bundles app,dmg
